name: Fetch and Compare Facts from APIs
description: Fetch a cat fact and a random fact from two different APIs, compare their lengths, and save the results to a file

tasks.name: Fetch cat fact
tasks.description: You MUST call http_request to fetch data from https://catfact.ninja/fact. Output the complete response body verbatim, not a summary. Downstream tasks need the raw JSON data.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains the raw JSON response from catfact.ninja API with at least a 'fact' field

tasks.name: Fetch random fact
tasks.description: You MUST call http_request to fetch data from https://uselessfacts.jsph.pl/api/v2/facts/random. Output the complete response body verbatim, not a summary. Downstream tasks need the raw JSON data.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains the raw JSON response from uselessfacts.jsph.pl API with at least a 'text' field

tasks.name: Compare fact lengths
tasks.description: You MUST call python_exec to write Python code that: (1) Parses the JSON from task_001 to extract the cat fact text (likely in a 'fact' field), (2) Parses the JSON from task_002 to extract the random fact text (likely in a 'text' field), (3) Calculates the length of both facts, (4) Determines which is longer. Output format: A JSON object with keys {cat_fact: str, cat_length: int, random_fact: str, random_length: int, winner: str} where winner is 'cat' or 'random' or 'tie'.
tasks.success_criteria: Output is valid JSON containing cat_fact, cat_length, random_fact, random_length, and winner fields with appropriate values

tasks.name: Save comparison results
tasks.description:
You MUST call file_write to save the comparison results to 'facts_comparison.txt'. Format the content as: 'Cat Fact: [cat_fact] (Length: [cat_length])

Random Fact: [random_fact] (Length: [random_length])

Winner: [winner] source gave the longer fact.' Use the data from task_003's JSON output.
tasks.success_criteria: File 'facts_comparison.txt' is created with both facts, their lengths, and the winner declaration

metadata.goal: Fetch data from two public APIs simultaneously, compare fact lengths, and save results
